info.title: DCMS API
info.description: Dyalog Content Management System REST API. Bearer token authentication is required for all write operations (POST, PUT, DELETE).

tags.name: video
tags.description: Read-only video search and detail (computed view)

tags.name: table
tags.description: Simple CRUD for reference and junction tables

Presenter.description: Junction table linking a person to a presentation, with optional organisation affiliation

code.description: Alphanumeric code, unique within its event

presented_at.description: Year and month during which this was presented

VideoResult.description: Computed read-only view joining youtube_video, presentation, event, presenter/person, and presentation_category

RecommendedVideoResult.description: Subset of VideoResult returned by the recommendations endpoint

from.description: Ordinal of first result on this page

to.description: Ordinal of last result on this page

total.description: Total matching results across all pages

post.description: Fetches fresh data from the database, rebuilds cached video indexes, and recomputes video recommendations using cosine similarity. Should be called after bulk data imports.

get.description: Returns a list of video results. When `per_page` is provided the response is paginated; otherwise an array is returned. Searching uses the Porter2 stemmer; filtering supports date ranges, event slug, and presenter name.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search terms separated by spaces, commas, or plus signs. Searches title, description, presenter, and event fields.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort order. `relevance` ranks by match score (only meaningful with `search`); `newest`/`oldest` sort by `presented_at`.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Include only videos presented on or after this date (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Include only videos presented on or before this date (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of results per page. When provided, the response is a paginated object rather than a plain array.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number (1-based). Only used when `per_page` is also set.

200.description: Video list, or paginated wrapper when `per_page` is supplied

get.description: Returns videos most similar to the given video, ranked by cosine similarity over stemmed text fields. Recommendations are precomputed at cache-build time.

parameters.name: v
parameters.description: YouTube ID of the reference video (exactly 11 characters).

parameters.name: n
parameters.description: Number of recommendations to return. Defaults to 1.

parameters.name: has_videos
parameters.description: When true, return only events that have at least one YouTube video linked through a presentation. Replaces the legacy `/dtv_events` endpoint.

parameters.name: is_presenter
parameters.description: When true, return only persons who have at least one entry in the presenter junction table. Use for building video library presenter filter lists.

get.description: Lists the presenter junction table (presentation ↔ person links). To get a flat list of persons who have presented, use `GET /person?is_presenter=true`.
Raw youtube_video table records. For the enriched video search view (with presenter, event, category), use `GET /video`.

get.summary: Get YouTube video record by ID
